contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Credentialing platform: orphan-key UX + GAS payload-parse fix + sha-on-overwrite + force backfill
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight.me/pull/103
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/30
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/294
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/295
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/296
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/297
  
  Details:
  Cluster of fixes that took the credentialing platform from a 404+0-minute state
  back to a working end-to-end pipeline:
  
  1. truesight.me PR #103 — credentials/index.html resolves pk-hash via _cache/aliases.json, distinguishes 'identity unknown' from 'cache rebuilding' for cleaner 404 UX on orphan keys.
  
  2. capoeira PR #30 — practice.html only reveals the 'View your public CV' link after a session has been submitted (hasSubmittedPractice gate), eliminating dead-link clicks for orphan keys.
  
  3. tokenomics PR #294 — practice_event_processing.gs parser was silently failing to extract the Payload JSON section (col M empty -> committed file payload:null -> CV showed 0 minutes). Added tolerant regex, balanced-brace JSON fallback that doesn't depend on the trailing '--------' sentinel, plus reprocessCredentialingRow(rowNumber) and reprocessAllRowsWithEmptyPayload() backfill functions.
  
  4. tokenomics PR #295 — doGet web-app actions so the backfill can be triggered via URL instead of requiring IDE access.
  
  5. tokenomics PR #296 — documented the Apps Script project ID (1Dj3-...) plus both deployment URLs inline in the GAS file header so future operator/AI sessions don't have to hunt through clasp_mirrors.
  
  6. tokenomics PR #297 — two follow-on fixes surfaced by actually running the backfill: (a) commitPracticeEvent now GETs existing blob sha before PUT (GitHub Contents API 422s without it on overwrite — that's why first backfill returned 0 reprocessed, 7 errors), (b) reprocessAllRowsWithEmptyPayload returns per-row errorDetails + accepts force=1 query param to bypass the 'already has col M' skip (which got tripped because col M is set BEFORE the failing commit, leaving rows half-broken on first attempt).
  
  Also: created a fresh ANYONE_ANONYMOUS deployment of the credentialing Apps Script (AKfycbwYx6B2BdUeDPyIzGMFznz9QqMEENQIxJR9Cvz8rzjYraYn2AWlQIj9Hs84nSJ28hvGHw) so AI sessions can drive the backfill via curl without needing the operator to refresh a browser tab. Drove the backfill from this session end-to-end: 8/8 rows reprocessed, lineage-credentials Build CV cache workflow rebuilt the cache, pk-4LBWHX9DJ_wH now shows 4 events / 124 minutes (was 0).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
